aesthetic_order_explanation: Dense central clustering with overlapping edges and nodes creates significant visual clutter, especially in the middle-right area.
cognitive_load_explanation: Tracking relationships among many nodes with crossing edges requires considerable effort; the color encoding adds another layer to decode.

aesthetic_order_explanation: Very crowded layout with overlapping labels and tightly packed bubbles; despite hierarchical organization, it feels dense and overwhelming.
cognitive_load_explanation: Requires significant time to parse the hierarchy, compare bubble sizes, and trace relationships across many categories and subcategories.

The monochromatic blue palette keeps color simple, but the sheer volume of data and text drives complexity very high.

data_density_explanation: Moderate number of data points (~25-30) spread across two distinct data series with error bars on one series.

cognitive_load_explanation: Requires distinguishing multiple series by color and shape, understanding trend lines, and interpreting domain-specific partition coefficients.

aesthetic_order_explanation: Dense, cluttered layout with overlapping words of varying sizes creating visual disorder across the space.
cognitive_load_explanation: Scanning and interpreting the relative importance of many legal terms requires moderate cognitive effort, though the word cloud format is familiar.

data_density_explanation: Moderate number of data points in a PCA scatterplot, supplemented by 3D wireframe models and silhouette illustrations adding information layers.

aesthetic_order_explanation: Moderately cluttered with overlapping illustrations, wireframes at periphery, and arrows converging in central region, though generally organized.
cognitive_load_explanation: High interpretive demand: must integrate PCA axes, group membership, morphological trajectories shown by arrows, and 3D wireframe reconstructions simultaneously.
summary: A PCA morphospace plot of dinosaur skull morphology with multiple taxonomic groups distinguished by color and shape, supplemented by directional arrows, 3D wireframe skull reconstructions, and animal silhouettes. The combination of statistical visualization with paleontological illustrations creates substantial visual and cognitive complexity.

data_density_explanation: A 6×6 grid of satellite imagery panels, each containing dense spatial data with continuous color fields representing different variables over time.

color_symbol_explanation: Rich color palettes spanning blue-green-yellow-red across panels; different color mappings per variable with high saturation.

cognitive_load_explanation: Comparing 6 variables across 6 time points with spatially complex patterns requires significant cognitive effort and domain expertise.
summary: A multi-panel satellite imagery dashboard showing 6 environmental variables (EVI, GPP, LST, NDVI, FPAR, LAI) across 6 time points in 2003. The dense color-mapped raster data and specialized domain content create high visual complexity despite the organized grid layout.

data_density_explanation: Dense continuous field data shown as a color-mapped surface with overlaid trajectory lines, representing substantial data volume.
visual_encoding_explanation: Multiple encoding types: continuous color field for humidity, line traces in red and blue, and a grayscale background layer creating a layered composite visualization.

aesthetic_order_explanation: Overlapping layers (grayscale background, color field, trajectory lines) create moderate visual clutter; the boundary between regions adds disorder.
cognitive_load_explanation: Must integrate multiple visual layers: background context, humidity field, and trajectory paths; requires domain familiarity to interpret fully.
summary: A meteorological visualization showing relative humidity as a green-yellow color field with red and blue trajectory lines overlaid on a partially grayscale background. The multi-layered encoding and domain-specific content create moderately high visual complexity.

data_density_explanation: Dense regular grid of glyphs with varying orientations and colors representing a vector field across hundreds of grid points.

domain_schema_explanation: Requires understanding of vector field visualization, glyph-based representations, and scientific visualization conventions.
color_symbol_explanation: Diverging color map from red/orange through yellow to green encodes a scalar quantity; 3D shading adds depth cues.
aesthetic_order_explanation: The regular grid provides structure, but the varying glyph orientations and overlapping elongated shapes create moderate visual density.
cognitive_load_explanation: Interpreting 3D glyph orientations, color mapping, and the underlying vector field pattern requires significant cognitive effort.
summary: A scientific vector field visualization using colored 3D glyphs on a regular grid. The combination of directional glyphs, color encoding, and dense spatial arrangement creates substantial visual complexity despite the organized grid layout. Domain-specific knowledge is needed for full interpretation.

data_density_explanation: Dense spatial data field with continuous color-mapped values across a geographic region, plus zoomed inset adding detail layers.

aesthetic_order_explanation: Moderately organized with the main map and inset, but the dark background with overlapping contours adds some visual density.
cognitive_load_explanation: Requires interpreting spatial patterns, understanding the color scale meaning, and connecting the zoomed inset to the main view.
summary: A meteorological/geospatial visualization showing primary banners with a continuous distance-based color scale and geographic contour overlays. The zoomed inset adds interpretive complexity, and the specialized domain context elevates cognitive demands.

data_density_explanation: Hundreds of glyph-like data points with directional indicators densely packed across the scatterplot area.
visual_encoding_explanation: Complex encoding combining position, color, orientation (line segments/arrows), and size in a glyph-based scatterplot with a side legend of bar charts.

cognitive_load_explanation: High cognitive demand to interpret glyph orientations, color mappings, and relate them to the smoothness legend on the right.
summary: A dense glyph-based scatterplot showing multivariate relationships with directional indicators and color encoding, accompanied by a smoothness ranking legend. data_density_explanation: Dense network of connections between many tech companies with numerous edges crossing and overlapping throughout the circular layout.

summary: A complex network diagram showing patent-related relationships among major tech companies arranged in a circular layout. data_density_explanation: Moderately dense scatterplot with ~150+ data points, error bars, and two overlapping categories creating some visual clutter.

color_symbol_explanation: Two-color scheme (red and black) with two symbol types (circles and triangles) plus blue dashed selection box; moderate but not extensive.
aesthetic_order_explanation: Moderate clutter from overlapping points and error bars, especially at lower redshifts; dashed box adds structural element.
cognitive_load_explanation: Requires understanding of redshift, X-ray luminosity, detection categories, and the significance of the dashed selection region.
summary: An astrophysics scatterplot showing X-ray luminosity versus redshift with two categories distinguished by color and symbol. Moderate data density with error bars and a dashed selection region, requiring domain knowledge to fully interpret.

data_density_explanation: Numerous data points (red dots) scattered across irregularly-sized Voronoi-like cells with varying text label sizes indicating relevance weighting.

color_symbol_explanation: Limited color palette (blue background, gray text, red dots, black borders) but functional use of size-coded text and point markers.
aesthetic_order_explanation: Irregular cell boundaries, overlapping text of different sizes, and scattered dots create a moderately cluttered appearance.
cognitive_load_explanation: Understanding the relationship between cell size, text size, dot placement, and connecting lines requires significant interpretive effort.
summary: A Voronoi-based treemap visualization showing search hits organized into relevance-adjusted cells with variable-size text labels and red data points. The irregular tessellation, multiple encoding channels, and specialized domain context create moderately high visual complexity.
